news.t: Cisco's AI Efforts Magnify These ETFs

holdings.infoBox: CSCL is an equity ETF with a total of 15 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins stock at 35.08%, Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 at 23.25%, Dreyfus Trsry Securities Cash Mgmt at 22.81%, Cisco Systems at 13.56%, and Cisco Systems Inc Swap at 10.66%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily CSCO Bull 2X ETF (CSCL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Cisco Systems, Inc. CSCL was launched on Jun 25, 2025 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Cisco's AI Efforts Magnify These ETFs
data.text: Shares of Cisco Systems (CSCO) rallied Thursday after the networking gear maker delivered April-quarter results that beat Wall Street estimates. More importantly, the technology company boosted its 20...
